reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: Dr. Rutvi is an excellent physiotherapist. Her diagnosis is spot on and her treatment for my chronic back pain has been life-changing. Highly recommended for home visits in Andheri!

reviews.author: Kunal M.
reviews.text: I had a sports injury and Dr. Rutvi's rehab program helped me get back on the field faster than I expected. She is very patient and explains the exercises clearly.

reviews.author: Meena R.
reviews.text: Post-surgery recovery was tough until Dr. Rutvi started her sessions. Her positive attitude and professional approach made a huge difference.

reviews.author: Sanjay D.
reviews.text: Very convenient to have such high-quality physiotherapy at home. She is punctual and very knowledgeable.
